name: Bakuchiol
description: A plant-based retinol alternative from babchi seeds that smooths fine lines without irritation.
scientificSummary: Activates retinol receptors and stimulates collagen production without causing the peeling associated with retinoids.
mechanismOfAction: Binds retinoid receptors and upregulates type I, III, and IV collagen while reducing MMP activity.

seo.title: Bakuchiol - Natural Retinol Alternative | Dew Theory
seo.description: Learn how Bakuchiol delivers retinol-like anti-aging benefits without irritation or sun sensitivity.
